name: Woody
hints: From: Animation (Toy Story)
About: A pull-string cowboy doll and leader of Andy's toys, fiercely loyal and always trying to stay relevant.

name: Buzz Lightyear
hints: From: Animation (Toy Story)
About: A space ranger action figure who initially believes he's a real hero, learning the value of teamwork and friendship.

name: Jessie
hints: From: Animation (Toy Story)
About: A spirited cowgirl doll with a yodel, who was once abandoned by her owner and eventually finds a new family.

name: Sulley
hints: From: Animation (Monsters Inc.)
About: A massive, blue-furred monster who works as a scarer but discovers laughter is more powerful than screams.

name: Mike Wazowski
hints: From: Animation (Monsters Inc.)
About: Sulley's one-eyed green best friend and assistant, known for his wisecracks and dreams of being a comedian.

name: Nemo
hints: From: Animation (Finding Nemo)
About: A young clownfish with a small, fin, who is captured and taken to Sydney, prompting his father's epic journey.

name: Dory
hints: From: Animation (Finding Nemo)
About: A cheerful blue tang fish with short-term memory loss, who helps Marlin find Nemo with her optimism and kindness.

name: Marlin
hints: From: Animation (Finding Nemo)
About: An overprotective clownfish father who crosses the entire ocean to find his son Nemo, learning to let go.

name: Mr. Incredible
hints: From: Animation (The Incredibles)
About: A retired superhero with super strength, forced back into action to save the world and rediscover his purpose.

name: Elastigirl
hints: From: Animation (The Incredibles)
About: An elastic superheroine who can stretch her body into any shape, balancing family life with crime-fighting.

name: Jack-Jack
hints: From: Animation (The Incredibles)
About: The baby of the Incredibles family, who unexpectedly develops a wide range of unpredictable superpowers.

name: WALL-E
hints: From: Animation (WALL-E)
About: A lonely trash-compacting robot left on a desolate Earth, who discovers love and embarks on an interstellar adventure.

name: EVE
hints: From: Animation (WALL-E)
About: A sleek, advanced probe robot sent to Earth to find signs of life, who captures WALL-E's heart and takes him to space.

name: Carl Fredricksen
hints: From: Animation (Up)
About: A grumpy elderly widower who ties thousands of balloons to his house to fulfill his dream of visiting South America.

name: Russell
hints: From: Animation (Up)
About: A cheerful and talkative Wilderness Explorer scout who accidentally becomes Carl's companion on his journey.

name: Dug
hints: From: Animation (Up)
About: A golden retriever with a special collar that translates his thoughts into speech, who is loyal and easily distracted.

name: Remy
hints: From: Animation (Ratatouille)
About: A Parisian rat with a refined palate who dreams of becoming a chef, despite the obvious obstacles.

name: Lightning McQueen
hints: From: Animation (Cars)
About: A young, arrogant race car who learns the value of friendship and community during a detour in a small town.

name: Mater
hints: From: Animation (Cars)
About: A rusty but lovable tow truck with a big heart and a Southern drawl, who becomes McQueen's best friend.

name: Miguel
hints: From: Animation (Coco)
About: A young aspiring musician who finds himself in the Land of the Dead, uncovering his family's true history.

name: Shrek
hints: From: Animation (Shrek)
About: A grumpy green ogre who loves his swamp and lives by his own rules, eventually finding love and friendship.

name: Fiona
hints: From: Animation (Shrek)
About: A princess cursed to turn into an ogre at night, who breaks the curse through true love and embraces her true self.

name: Donkey
hints: From: Animation (Shrek)
About: A hyperactive and talkative donkey who becomes Shrek's loyal sidekick, often annoying him with endless chatter.

name: Puss in Boots
hints: From: Animation (Shrek)
About: A charismatic and swashbuckling feline outlaw who uses his big eyes and tiny boots to charm his way out of trouble.

name: Alex
hints: From: Animation (Madagascar)
About: A pampered lion and star attraction of Central Park Zoo, who learns to embrace his wild side on an adventure.

name: Marty
hints: From: Animation (Madagascar)
About: A zebra who dreams of life in the wild and accidentally leads his zoo friends on an escape to Madagascar.

name: Melman
hints: From: Animation (Madagascar)
About: A neurotic giraffe with a tendency to worry about everything, especially his own health.

name: Gloria
hints: From: Animation (Madagascar)
About: A confident and sassy hippo who acts as the voice of reason among her zoo friends.

name: Po
hints: From: Animation (Kung Fu Panda)
About: A clumsy and food-loving panda who unexpectedly becomes the Dragon Warrior, learning kung fu to save his valley.

name: Tigress
hints: From: Animation (Kung Fu Panda)
About: A fierce and disciplined kung fu master, the most skilled of the Furious Five, who initially doubts Po's abilities.

name: Toothless
hints: From: Animation (How to Train Your Dragon)
About: A night fury dragon who becomes the loyal companion of a Viking boy, known for his jet-black scales and retractable teeth.

name: Hiccup
hints: From: Animation (How to Train Your Dragon)
About: An inventive and compassionate Viking boy who challenges his village's traditions by befriending a dragon.

name: Astrid
hints: From: Animation (How to Train Your Dragon)
About: A fierce Viking warrior and Hiccup's love interest, who initially sees him as a misfit but becomes his strongest ally.

name: Megamind
hints: From: Animation (Megamind)
About: An alien supervillain with a gigantic blue head who discovers that being bad isn't all it's cracked up to be.

name: Gru
hints: From: Animation (Despicable Me)
About: A supervillain with an Eastern European accent and a heart of gold, who adopts three girls and eventually goes straight.

name: Kevin (Minion)
hints: From: Animation (Despicable Me)
About: A tall, one-eyed minion who often takes charge, known for his leadership and his love of bananas.

name: Stuart (Minion)
hints: From: Animation (Despicable Me)
About: A short, one-eyed minion with a guitar, often the center of minion mischief and chaos.

name: Bob (Minion)
hints: From: Animation (Despicable Me)
About: A small, two-eyed minion with a teddy bear, known for his innocence and childlike antics.

name: Manny
hints: From: Animation (Ice Age)
About: A grumpy but soft-hearted woolly mammoth who leads a herd of prehistoric animals during the ice age.

name: Sid
hints: From: Animation (Ice Age)
About: A clumsy and talkative ground sloth with a lisp, who has a big heart and often accidentally causes trouble.

name: Diego
hints: From: Animation (Ice Age)
About: A sharp-toothed saber-toothed tiger who starts as a predator but becomes a loyal member of the herd.

name: Scrat
hints: From: Animation (Ice Age)
About: A nut-obsessed prehistoric squirrel-rat whose desperate quest for acorns often triggers continental-scale disasters.

name: Mickey Mouse
hints: From: Animation (Disney)
About: The cheerful and iconic Disney mascot, a red-shorted mouse who is always ready for a musical adventure.

name: Donald Duck
hints: From: Animation (Disney)
About: A temperamental white duck with a blue sailor shirt, who often has explosive outbursts of anger.

name: Goofy
hints: From: Animation (Disney)
About: A tall, clumsy, and good-natured anthropomorphic dog who always tries his best, with hilarious results.

name: Simba
hints: From: Animation (The Lion King)
About: A young lion prince who must overcome guilt and embrace his destiny to become the rightful king of the Pride Lands.

name: Mufasa
hints: From: Animation (The Lion King)
About: The wise and powerful king of the Pride Lands, Simba's beloved father, who appears as a spirit to guide his son.

name: Scar
hints: From: Animation (The Lion King)
About: The sinister and manipulative brother of Mufasa, who seizes the throne by treachery, marking his reign with tyranny.

name: Timon
hints: From: Animation (The Lion King)
About: A wisecracking meerkat who adopts the philosophy of 'Hakuna Matata', living with his warthog best friend.

name: Pumbaa
hints: From: Animation (The Lion King)
About: A loving and flatulent warthog who adopts Simba and teaches him the carefree lifestyle of 'no worries'.

name: Aladdin
hints: From: Animation (Aladdin)
About: A clever street rat who finds a magical lamp and uses his wishes to win the heart of Princess Jasmine.

name: Genie
hints: From: Animation (Aladdin)
About: A larger-than-life magical being trapped in a lamp, with incredible powers and a fast-talking personality.

name: Jasmine
hints: From: Animation (Aladdin)
About: The spirited princess of Agrabah who seeks independence and falls in love with a street rat, marrying for love.

name: Ariel
hints: From: Animation (The Little Mermaid)
About: A curious and adventurous mermaid princess who trades her voice for legs to explore the human world and find love.

name: Ursula
hints: From: Animation (The Little Mermaid)
About: A manipulative and scheming sea witch who strikes deals with desperate merfolk, using tentacles and dramatic flair.

name: Belle
hints: From: Animation (Beauty and the Beast)
About: A book-loving village girl who sees beyond a beast's monstrous appearance, falling in love with the man inside.

name: Beast
hints: From: Animation (Beauty and the Beast)
About: A prince cursed to look like a beast, who must learn to love and be loved to break the spell.

name: Mulan
hints: From: Animation (Mulan)
About: A fearless young woman who disguises herself as a man to take her father's place in the Chinese army, saving her country.

name: Mushu
hints: From: Animation (Mulan)
About: A small, fire-breathing dragon who serves as Mulan's guardian spirit, often causing more trouble than he solves.

name: Elsa
hints: From: Animation (Frozen)
About: The Snow Queen of Arendelle, who struggles to control her powerful ice magic while protecting her kingdom.

name: Peter Pan
hints: From: Animation (Peter Pan)
About: A mischievous boy who can fly and never grows up, leading the Lost Boys on adventures in Neverland.

name: Tinker Bell
hints: From: Animation (Peter Pan)
About: A feisty pixie who is Peter's loyal companion, known for her jealousy, her tinkering, and her dust that lets people fly.

name: Captain Hook
hints: From: Animation (Peter Pan)
About: A vengeful pirate captain with a hook for a hand, who is obsessed with capturing Peter Pan and terrified of the crocodile.

name: Jack Skellington
hints: From: Animation (The Nightmare Before Christmas)
About: The Pumpkin King of Halloween Town, a lanky, charismatic skeleton who discovers Christmas and tries to claim it for himself.

name: Sally
hints: From: Animation (The Nightmare Before Christmas)
About: A ragdoll creation who is in love with Jack, with a kind heart and the ability to see his good intentions.

name: Oogie Boogie
hints: From: Animation (The Nightmare Before Christmas)
About: A burlap sack filled with bugs and greed, the villain of Halloween Town who loves gambling and causing fear.

name: Coraline
hints: From: Animation (Coraline)
About: A curious and brave young girl who discovers a parallel world behind a hidden door, where her 'Other Mother' has sinister plans.

name: Wallace
hints: From: Animation (Wallace & Gromit)
About: A cheese-loving, eccentric inventor from northern England, who often gets his dog Gromit into trouble with his inventions.

name: Gromit
hints: From: Animation (Wallace & Gromit)
About: A silent, intelligent beagle who is Wallace's loyal companion, often saving the day with his sharp mind.

name: Shaun the Sheep
hints: From: Animation (Shaun the Sheep)
About: A mischievous, intelligent sheep who is the leader of the flock at Mossy Bottom Farm, always looking for fun.

name: Aang
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: The last Airbender and the Avatar, a young, playful monk destined to bring balance to the world.

name: Katara
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: A determined and compassionate Waterbender from the Southern Water Tribe, who travels with Aang to master the elements.

name: Sokka
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: Katara's sarcastic older brother, a non-bender who uses his wit and boomerang to support his friends.

name: Toph Beifong
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: A blind Earthbending prodigy who learns from the badgermoles, becoming one of the most powerful benders in the world.

name: Zuko
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: The exiled prince of the Fire Nation, determined to capture the Avatar to restore his honor, but eventually finds his own path.

name: Iroh
hints: From: Animation (Avatar: The Last Airbender)
About: Zuko's wise and tea-loving uncle, a retired Fire Nation general who offers guidance and humor in equal measure.

name: Totoro
hints: From: Animation (My Neighbor Totoro)
About: A large, furry forest spirit who befriends two young girls, helping them navigate their new surroundings in rural Japan.

name: No-Face
hints: From: Animation (Spirited Away)
About: A mysterious, faceless spirit who absorbs the greed of others and devours them, redeemed by the kindness of a young girl.

name: Chihiro
hints: From: Animation (Spirited Away)
About: A young girl trapped in a spirit world, who works in a bathhouse to save her parents and learn self-belief.

name: Haku
hints: From: Animation (Spirited Away)
About: A boy who can turn into a dragon, acting as an ally to Chihiro in the spirit world, hiding a secret past.
